source.permission: Forked with permission from Thariq Shihipar (ThariqS) on 2026-05-12. Adapted for cross-tool agent scaffolding under haac-aikit's MIT license.

templates.title: Three code approaches
templates.description: Side-by-side comparison of multiple ways to solve the same problem, with trade-offs called out inline.

templates.title: Visual design directions
templates.description: A handful of layout and palette options rendered live so you can react to them, not imagine them.

templates.title: Annotated pull request
templates.description: A diff rendered with margin notes, severity tags and jump links — easier to scan than scrolling a terminal.

templates.title: Module map
templates.description: An unfamiliar package drawn as boxes and arrows, with the hot path highlighted and entry points listed.

templates.title: Living design system
templates.description: Colors, type scale and spacing tokens pulled from a repo and rendered as swatches you can copy from.

templates.title: Component variants
templates.description: Every size, state and intent of one component laid out on a single sheet for review.

templates.title: Animation sandbox
templates.description: A transition in isolation with sliders for duration and easing, so you can tune it before wiring it in.

templates.title: Clickable flow
templates.description: Several screens linked together — enough fidelity to feel whether the interaction is right.

templates.title: Arrow-key slide deck
templates.description: A short presentation as one HTML file. Left and right to navigate, no build step.

templates.title: SVG figure sheet
templates.description: Diagrams for a post or doc, drawn inline so they can be tweaked and copied out one by one.

templates.title: Weekly status
templates.description: What shipped, what slipped, and a small chart — formatted for a quick skim on Monday morning.

templates.title: Incident timeline
templates.description: A post-mortem with a minute-by-minute timeline, log excerpts and a follow-up checklist.

templates.title: Annotated flowchart
templates.description: A pipeline drawn as a real flowchart — click any step to see what runs, timings, and failure paths.

templates.title: How a feature works
templates.description: A deep-dive on one feature: TL;DR box, collapsible request-path steps, tabbed config snippets, FAQ.

templates.title: Concept explainer
templates.description: A concept taught with a live interactive widget, a comparison table, and a hover-linked glossary.

templates.title: Implementation plan
templates.description: Milestones on a timeline, a data-flow diagram, inline mockups, key code, and a risk table.

templates.title: PR writeup for reviewers
templates.description: Author's side: motivation, before/after, a file-by-file tour with the why, and where to focus.

templates.title: Ticket triage board
templates.description: Drag tickets across columns (Now / Next / Later / Cut), then copy the final ordering out as markdown.

templates.title: Feature flag editor
templates.description: Toggles grouped by area, dependency warnings when a prerequisite is off, and a 'copy diff' button for changed keys.

templates.title: Prompt tuner
templates.description: Editable template on the left with variable slots highlighted; sample inputs on the right re-render live as you type.
